title: SnowballsPlus
description: Add more snowballs and go to a snowball fight with your friends!
body:
# Welcome to SnowballsPlus Mod
![ModTitle](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/MitrX3QU/images/e5ff0b2255178205eb65c124598910aa773f6fa6.png)
## What can it do?
1. More snowballs have been added, each with a different function.
2. Each snowball has a recipe(You can use REI to find them)
3. Make your game more lively

## Snowball's function
### Aggressive snowball(The order is not in any particular order)
> 1. **IceSnowball:2 damage to the player,5 damage to the Blaze**
> 2. **AmethystSnowball:Damage 4 to player,damage 5 to the Blaze,If the hit entity has less or equal to 10 HP, it will receive an additional 4 damage**
> 3. **BloodthirstySnowball:One-fifth of the Snowball owner's HP = Damage to entities,tenth of the Snowball owner's HP = Damage to the Snowball owner**
> 4. **FangsSnowball:Summon the Fang entity after hitting the entity**
> 5. **SmallSnowball:1 damage to the player,3 damage to the Blaze**
> 6. **StonesSnowball:2 damage to the player,5 damage to the Blaze,Additional damage to entities surrounding the hit entity**
![Show](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/MitrX3QU/images/dace161219c6182d32fb77b5645cf6b9b4e023ad.png)

### Auxiliary snowball(The order is not in any particular order)
> 1. **FortressSnowball:A small fortress is generated after hitting an entity**
> 2. **HealthySnowball:If the player's HP is less than 15.0, it reverts to 15 after hitting the player**
> 3. **MarkerSnowball:Set the target of the surrounding 8*8 entities to the hit entity**
> 4. **SuctionSnowball:Pull entities to the player**
> 5. **WallSnowball:Create a wall of ice**
![Show](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/MitrX3QU/images/36c9f5acb0329b251b7408422cd49da3b263852f.png)
## Notes
1. ***Both 1.20.1 and 1.19.4 are now supported***
2. ***1.19.4 is not supported in the next release***
3. ***The author allows you to put this mod in your modpack,but the author and source must be declared***
4. ***This mod will not be ported to Forge or lower versions***
5. ***If you have a better idea for adding more snowballs, please come [GitHub Pages](https://github.com/AOMIAOMAO/SnowballsPlus/issues/) and tell to the author***
